title: 2 Pcs Toilet Paper Holder Rollers, Toilet Roll Holder, Plastic Toilet Tissue Roll Holder Insert Spring Loaded Bathroom Replacement Roller - Easy installation
features: holder roller features a smooth, clean surface that enhances the modern, sleek aesthetic of your bathroom. Built for durability and functionality, it ensures a tidy and stylish look in your space.

Perfect Replacement for Broken or Missing Rollers: This toilet paper holder roller serves as an ideal replacement for any damaged or missing rollers. The set includes two rollers, making it perfect for homes with multiple bathrooms or as a spare to keep on hand for easy replacement.

Adjustable Size for Versatile Use: The spring-loaded roller is adjustable, ranging from 6.2 inches (15.8cm) to 4.1 inches (10.5cm), ensuring it fits a wide variety of toilet paper rolls. Its adjustable feature allows it to accommodate different roll sizes, making it versatile for all needs.

Easy Installation with Spring Mechanism: Installation is a breeze! Simply insert one end of the roller and the spring mechanism securely locks it in place. No tools required, ensuring a hassle-free and quick setup for anyone.

Universal Fit for Most Toilet Paper Holders: Designed to securely hold toilet paper rolls of various sizes, the spring-loaded roller fits most standard toilet paper holders. Its adjustable spring ensures a snug and secure fit, making it perfect for homes, offices, and public restrooms alike.
